## Sprint Deploy Report

**Status: ✅ HEALTHY — stack already running, no new deployment needed**

The harness observability stack was already provisioned and running (started 2026-03-25). A fresh `docker compose up` was attempted but aborted due to port conflicts — the existing shared stack holds all required ports. Conflicting containers were cleaned up; the live stack was retained and verified.
